string.text: I need medical assistance.

I can treat all your injuries for a price. I have a special serum that will put you back on your feet in no time. Unless you're irradiated - that, the serum cannot fix. Still, I could flush all that glowing shit out of you with another treatment for a separate fee.\nSo, what have you decided?
Ah, of course, can't even keep yourself in one piece. Let's see...
Huh? Right, come on over.
Yeah, I'll fix you up... for a fee.
You don't have any wounds or show signs of radiation sickness. You should be good to go.
I'll take a look... Hmm... You look fine to me.
Hmm... Hands and feet are okay... head is in place... Yeah, you're alright.
Dude, you're healthier than a bloodsucker.
Don't be ridiculous. You're okay.
Heal my wounds. %c[ui_orange][%s RU]
Get the radiation out of me. %c[ui_orange][%s RU]
Fuck it, I need to be in a good shape. %c[ui_orange][%s RU]
You know what, Doc? Fix yourself!
Here you go, stay safe next time.
Up to you.
What interesting stuff do you have in those rooms behind the guard?

Not what, but who. There's a seasoned guy there, he can get you any unique gear you want. But you can't go there now, first I have to make sure I can trust you, meaning your reputation must be %c[ui_orange]good%c[ui_8].
So, can I go see this person now?
Hmm, okay. I'll let Garik know. That guy's name is Nimble. Straight ahead and to the right down the corridor.
What interesting stuff do you have in those rooms behind the guard?

Not what, but who. There's a guy there, experienced, he can get you some unique gear. Hmm, I know you as a reliable person with a good reputation. You can tell Garik to let you through to see this guy they call Nimble. Straight ahead and to the right down the corridor.
I need to pass.
Within the next two days, the assortment of most traders will be replenished with new items.
Within the next two days, the assortment of all medics and barmens (Beard and Librarian) will be improved.
I hear you're a merchant?
It's true. But my trade isn't for everyone. If you can prove yourself as a skilled artifact hunter, then come and trade with me.\n\n%c[ui_orange][to trade the Geologist achievement must be unlocked]
For your dedicated service to the cause of Duty, you have earned the respect of your comrades. Over the next two days, you will have access to an elite assortment.
You really saved the day, bro! Over the next two days, you'll get some top-notch goods from our dealers.
Your assistance in the research work has not gone unnoticed. Over the next two days, you will gain access to special scientific supplies.
Well done, man, in the name of Freedom! Over the next two days, you'll have access to the best guns and gear from our merchants.
You work cleanly and quietly. Your clients are satisfied - you've earned access to elite supplies. Come by in the next couple of days.
By order of the command, you are commended for exemplary performance of your duties. Over the next two days, you will have access to elite army supplies.
You have served Monolith well! You will now have access to the elite assortment over for the next two days.
Your reputation as a reliable stalker precedes you. Over the next two days, merchants will offer you a special assortment.
The balance in the Zone has been preserved thanks to your actions. Over the next two days, you will be granted access to special equipment from Clear Sky.
Turn on the radio.
Turn off the radio.
